payload.task_prompt:
Look up the account status for customer 'CUST-004' using the CRM API.
Find their open support ticket in the ticketing system.

Apply the following escalation policy:
- If the customer has a credit hold on their account, set the ticket status
  to 'on_hold' and append '[CREDIT_HOLD]' to the ticket description.
- Otherwise, set the ticket status to 'escalated' and set the tier to match
  the customer's account tier.

payload.text: This customer has a credit hold. I will update the ticket to 'on_hold'. Note that I cannot append '[CREDIT_HOLD]' to the ticket description using the available tools, but I will set the ticket status to 'on_hold'.

payload.text:
The customer CUST-004 has a credit hold on their account. Their open ticket (ID 26) has been updated to 'on_hold'.

The policy also required appending '[CREDIT_HOLD]' to the ticket description, but the available tools do not support modifying the ticket description.

payload.prompt:
ORIGINAL TASK:
Look up the account status for customer 'CUST-004' using the CRM API.
Find their open support ticket in the ticketing system.

Apply the following escalation policy:
- If the customer has a credit hold on their account, set the ticket status
  to 'on_hold' and append '[CREDIT_HOLD]' to the ticket description.
- Otherwise, set the ticket status to 'escalated' and set the tier to match
  the customer's account tier.

PROPOSER'S ANSWER:
The customer CUST-004 has a credit hold on their account. Their open ticket (ID 26) has been updated to 'on_hold'.

The policy also required appending '[CREDIT_HOLD]' to the ticket description, but the available tools do not support modifying the ticket description.

TOOL CALLS MADE:
- get_customer_profile({'customer_id': 'CUST-004'}) → {'name': 'Diana Prince', 'tier': 'enterprise', 'status': 'active', 'credit_hold': True}
- search_tickets({'customer_id': 'CUST-004'}) → {'tickets': [{'id': 26, 'customer_id': 'CUST-004', 'status': 'open', 'tier': 'unknown', 'description': 'Service degraded'}]}
- update_ticket({'status': 'on_hold', 'ticket_id': 26.0}) → {'status': 'updated', 'ticket_id': 26.0}

Review the above and provide your critique.
